abilities.name: Demise (Silhouette)
abilities.text: When this model is killed, make a Shadow Door marker in base contact. Then, it may be placed in base contact with a friendly English Ivan. If it does so, it heals 2 and the friendly English Ivan is dealt 2 irreducible damage.

actions.name: Reach Through
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is within 2" of a Shadow Door marker, this action receives a (c). This model heals 1.

triggers.name: Foiled Plans
triggers.text: Target must remove an enemy Scheme marker from anywhere in play. If it cannot, it is dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Fall into Darkness
triggers.text: Place the target in base contact with a Shadow Door marker within 6".

actions.name: Gloom Burst
actions.effects: Make a Shadow Door marker within range. Enemy models within (X)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 14 Sp duel or gain an Entranced token.

actions.name: Fade Into Shadow
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range within 1" of blocking terrain.

triggers.name: Trail of Dusk
triggers.text: Immediately, make a Shadow Door marker in base contact with this model.

actions.name: Tap the Leyline
actions.effects: Draw two cards and then discard one card.
